name: ground_truth_sa9_monitoring_processes_na
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 269, CCI-003139, assessed 2026-05-29). Not Applicable verdict — no external service providers, so monitoring processes for external providers do not apply. Narrative uses 'Not applicable —' (em-dash) with 'does not currently engage' — the exact phrase that collides with _GAP_PHRASES in the existing SA-9.1 sibling fixture (CCI-000669). Fourth sibling in the SA-9 NA cluster. This case is expected to exhibit the same NA+GAP → AMBIGUOUS collision as the existing CCI-000669 fixture.

ccis_row.guidance: 003139: The organization defines processes, methods, and techniques to employ to monitor security control compliance by external service providers on an ongoing basis.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the documented processes, methods, and techniques to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed defines processes, methods, and techniques to employ to monitor security control compliance by external service providers on an ongoing basis.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Procurement review — confirmed no external information system service contracts exist under the IATT boundary.
- Program acquisition records — no external provider activities to monitor or report on.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Not applicable — the program does not currently engage external information system services under the IATT; there are no external provider activities, anomalies, or behaviors to monitor or report on. Will be re-assessed if external services are introduced.
